name: Larva
description: A Tier 1 aggressive predator found across much of the park's early game. It remains one of the first enemies that can truly punish an unprepared player.
behavior: It roams without a fixed route, emerging from larva caves to patrol, rest, and feed. It is less nocturnal here than in the Backyard, but it still burrows and disguises itself as something much easier to kill than it really is.
interactionWithPlayer: It is immediately hostile, bites at close range, and uses lunges to collapse space. If you leave it badly hurt it may break off and flee, so winning the trade is not always enough; sometimes you also have to finish the job quickly.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually ignores other creatures unless provoked. Its nastiest trick against the player is burying itself and passing for easy prey, which makes any underground gathering route much tenser.
strategy: A single larva falls to almost any competent weapon, but packs are a different story. Block the strings, avoid tight corridors, and do not chase a burrowed one if another larva is already cutting off your exit.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: It leans to the side and performs a quick blockable bite.

abilities.name: 2-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It extends the basic bite with an immediate second hit.

abilities.name: 3-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It adds a third quick bite if you stay too close.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It winds up and lunges with a stronger bite that also covers a lot of distance.
